title: hemigenia teretiuscula
intro: Hemigenia teretiuscula is a small shrub native to Australia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hemigenia teretiuscula include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and colds. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used as a tincture or incorporated into topical creams for various herbal applications.
